title: New law will help start-up small businesses access capital through crowdfunding while providing greater consumer protections for investors.

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Small Business Equity Crowdfunding Act will help entrepreneurs and start-up small businesses access capital through crowdfunding.",
    "The new law provides greater consumer protections to investors participating in equity crowdfunding financing.",
    "Small businesses account for over two-thirds of new jobs nationally.",
    "Prior to the JOBS Act, securities law restrictions made raising equity capital unattainable for most people.",
    "AB 511 aims to equal the playing field by allowing entrepreneurs from around California access to capital who otherwise would not have it.",
    "The JOBS Act has modernized regulations for raising equity capital by establishing crowdfunding provisions.",
    "The JOBS Act has not been effective in providing small businesses with access to critical seed-stage capital.",
    "AB 511 creates an exemption from state securities qualification for offerings up to $300,000 under SEC Regulation Crowdfunding.",
    "AB 511 includes investor protections not present in the JOBS Act, such as a provision for attorney's fees for prevailing investors."
  ]
}
```
